creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ulas SAYGIN from comment #6)
> first, change [the] build system from bazel to cmake or make
We've been doing it since day one: on FreeBSD, the port is built with pure GNU make.  I've feared this might not scale well against newer versions, but it's still quite manageable as of recent update to version 1.26.1.

> we will also need openssl support.
Yes, we certainly do, e.g. because BoringSSL prevents it from being packaged by default: one has to manually set DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=boringssl.

> latest version seems there is support for openssl.
I've poked around that OpenSSL fork when it appeared, but couldn't get it to work, patches welcome!
